about.heading:
Crafting digital
experiences that
resonate
about.body: I keep building products centered on user experience, from frontend to backend.
profile: Kaito Kanbe (formerly Kaito Sekimoto). Born in 1998 in Sapporo, Hokkaido. Currently working as a Community Development Coordinator in Hiroo, Hokkaido. In my previous role as a housing sales representative, I ranked 6th nationwide in my first year — a track record of bold action and business acumen that underpins everything I do today.

As a coordinator, I manage the local currency 'Sapuri', built a LINE chatbot using a local LLM + RAG system, operate and develop the local job site 'Hiroo Shigoto' (complete with an AI chatbot), and provide website creation and DX consulting for local small and medium-sized businesses.

cards.title: The Board
cards.desc: A real-time boardroom simulator where multiple AI agents debate and make decisions. Built with FastAPI + LangGraph + Gemini.

cards.title: Face Portfolio
cards.desc: An interactive 3D portfolio using Three.js and GLB models — the very site you're browsing.

cards.title: Knowledge Nexus
cards.desc: A 'second brain' for engineers. Gemini AI auto-analyzes URLs and PDFs, generates quizzes, and maps knowledge. Built with Vite + React + Supabase + Firecrawl API.

cards.title: Smart Check-in
cards.desc: A self check-in app for unstaffed accommodations. Two-factor auth with WebAuthn biometrics + Secret Code. Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Supabase + Vercel Cron.

cards.title: ID Photo Studio
cards.desc: A web app for creating ID photos powered by Gemini AI. Background color change, auto suit addition, and preset sizes for passports and more. Next.js + Gemini Image AI.

cards.title: Sapuri CSV Center
cards.desc: An AI data-extraction tool for the local currency 'Sapuri' membership forms. Gemini AI batch-processes PDFs and images, outputting CSV/Excel. Next.js + Gemini AI + Docker.

cards.title: Sapuri LINE Bot
cards.desc: A LINE chatbot for merchants of Hiroo's local currency 'Sapuri'. Uses a local LLM (Ollama) + RAG to answer queries without sending personal data externally. Python + FastAPI + ChromaDB.

cards.title: AI Agent × Agent
cards.desc: A multi-agent collaboration system using CrewAI. Five agents — Researcher, Analyst, Writer, Critic, and PM — automate the full pipeline from research to publishing. Python + CrewAI + Gemini API.

cards.title: Coachtech Freemarket
cards.desc: A flea market platform built with PHP/Laravel. Implements Stripe payments, trade chat, mutual reviews, and email notifications. Laravel 8 + MySQL + Nginx + Docker.

cards.title: Remotion Video
cards.desc: A motion graphics engine that generates videos with React — a next-gen approach to creating video through code.

cards.title: Contact Form
cards.desc: A multi-functional contact form built with Laravel. User registration, login, admin search, and management features. PHP 8.1 + Laravel 8.75 + MySQL + Docker.

contact.heading:
Let's Create
Something
Together
contact.desc: Open to new projects, collaborations, and freelance work. I'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
